controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - managing risks in outsourcing) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of these directions either at the time of renewal or by april 10, 2026, whichever is earlier
controls.control_description:
Provided that for Non-Banking Financial Companies covered under the scope of
these Directions, as mentioned in paragraph 3, their existing Information Technology
(IT) outsourcing agreements regardless of whether they are due for renewal on or
after the effective date of these Directions shall comply with the provisions of these
Directions either at the time of renewal or by April 10, 2026, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of these directions either at the time of renewal or by april 10, 2026, whichever is earlier

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of these directions from the date of agreement itself
controls.control_description:
However, their new IT outsourcing agreements that come into force on or after the
effective date of these Directions, shall comply with the provisions of these
Directions from the date of agreement itself.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of these directions from the date of agreement itself

controls.control_objective: To ensure be construed as permitting non-compliance with any other extant regulatory instructions or statutory requirements applicable to such arrangements
controls.control_description:
Provided further that, nothing in the preceding proviso shall be construed as
permitting non-compliance with any other extant regulatory instructions or statutory
requirements applicable to such arrangements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be construed as permitting non-compliance with any other extant regulatory instructions or statutory requirements applicable to such arrangements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to following non-banking financial companies, (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as an nbfc)
controls.control_description:
(1) These Directions shall be applicable to following Non-Banking Financial
Companies, (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as an
NBFC), subject to layer-wise applicability:
Note: The applicability under these Directions is in line with the regulatory
structure for NBFCs as set out in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Registration, Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based
Regulation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to following non-banking financial companies, (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as an nbfc)

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to nbfcs included in base layer
controls.control_description:
(2) The provisions prescribed in these directions except Chapter IV and IT-specific
provisions contained in Chapter II (e.g., Board-level IT outsourcing policy and
responsibilities of and reviews by the Board with respect to IT outsourcing) of
these Directions shall apply to NBFCs included in Base layer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to nbfcs included in base layer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as under: (1) the provisions shall apply to material outsourcing arrangements entered into by an nbfc with a service provider which may be either a
controls.control_description:
The scope of provisions contained in Chapter III shall be as under:
(1) The provisions shall apply to material outsourcing arrangements entered into by
an NBFC with a service provider which may be either a member of the group /
conglomerate to which the NBFC belongs, or an unrelated party which is located
in India or elsewhere for outsourcing of financial services like applications
<image>
processing (loan origination, credit card), document processing, marketing and
research, supervision of loans, data processing and back office related activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as under: (1) the provisions shall apply to material outsourcing arrangements entered into by an nbfc with a service provider which may be either a

controls.control_objective: To ensure also apply to the applicable entities
controls.control_description:
Provided that for outsourced services relating to credit cards, the provisions set
out in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit
Cards: Issuance and Conduct) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time,
shall also apply to the applicable entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also apply to the applicable entities

controls.control_description:
The scope of provisions contained in Chapter IV shall be as under:
(1) The provisions shall apply to an NBFC's material outsourcing of IT services, as
defined in paragraph 58(2) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as under: (1) the provisions shall apply to an nbfc's material outsourcing of it services, as defined in paragraph 58(2) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure banking companies (other than small finance banks, local area banks, payments banks and regional rural banks), corresponding new banks, and the state
controls.control_description:
and Payment System Operators,
For the purpose of these Directions, 'Commercial Banks' means banking
companies (other than Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks,
Payments Banks and Regional Rural Banks), corresponding new banks,
and the State Bank of India as defined respectively under clauses (c),
(da), and (nc) of section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.

controls.control_description:
'Continuing basis' shall include agreements for a
limited period.

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the information technology act, 2000 or the companies
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or the
Information Technology Act, 2000 or the Companies Act, 2013 and Rules made
<image>
thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto, or Glossary of
Terms published by RBI or as used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the information technology act, 2000 or the companies

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place corresponding comprehensive board approved outsourcing policy, the coverage of which is indicated in paragraph 20 and paragraph 62, respe
controls.control_description:
An NBFC intending to outsource any of its financial or IT activities shall put in
place corresponding comprehensive Board approved outsourcing policy, the
coverage of which is indicated in paragraph 20 and paragraph 62, respectively.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place corresponding comprehensive board approved outsourcing policy, the coverage of which is indicated in paragraph 20 and paragraph 62, respe

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for putting in place a framework to evaluate the risks and materiality of all existing and prospective outsourcing arrangements, laying
controls.control_description:
The Board or a Committee of the Board to which powers have been delegated, as
applicable for financial or IT outsourcing, shall be responsible for putting in place a
framework to evaluate the risks and materiality of all existing and prospective
outsourcing arrangements, laying down appropriate approval authorities
depending on risks and materiality, and undertaking regular review.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be responsible for putting in place a framework to evaluate the risks and materiality of all existing and prospective outsourcing arrangements, laying

controls.control_description:
In respect of outsourcing of financial services,
(1) the Board, or a Committee of the Board to which powers have been

controls.control_description:
(vii) reviewing records of all material outsourcing on half yearly basis, in
which case the delegation should be to Risk Management Committee
only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be to risk management committee only

In respect of outsourcing of IT services, the Board shall be responsible, inter alia,

controls.control_description:
(iv) ensuring either by itself or through its Committee that there is no conflict of
interest arising out of third-party engagements, especially when permitting an
exception to the requirement that the service provider of outsourced services,
if not a group company, shall not be owned or controlled by any director, key
managerial personnel, approver of the outsourcing arrangement, or their
relatives, as indicated under the proviso to paragraph 59 of these Directions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be owned or controlled by any director, key managerial personnel, approver of the outsourcing arrangement, or their relatives, as indicated under the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be outsourced
controls.control_description: Activities that shall not be outsourced
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be outsourced

controls.control_objective: To ensure however not outsource core management functions including internal audit, strategic and compliance functions, and decision-making functions such as de
controls.control_description:
An NBFC which chooses to outsource financial services shall however not
outsource core management functions including Internal Audit, strategic and
compliance functions, and decision-making functions such as determining
compliance with KYC norms for opening deposit accounts, giving sanction for
loans (including retail loans) and management of investment portfolio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to however not outsource core management functions including internal audit, strategic and compliance functions, and decision-making functions such as de

controls.control_objective: To ensure for an nbfc in a group / conglomerate, these functions may be outsourced within the group subject to compliance with instructions in paragraph 45 to p
controls.control_description:
Provided that for an NBFC in a group / conglomerate, these functions may be
outsourced within the group subject to compliance with instructions in paragraph
45 to paragraph 51.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to for an nbfc in a group / conglomerate, these functions may be outsourced within the group subject to compliance with instructions in paragraph 45 to p

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval from rbi
controls.control_description:
An NBFC, which desires to outsource financial services, shall not require prior
approval from RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval from rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure diminish its obligations including to its customers and rbi, and those of its board and senior management, who have the ultimate responsibility for th
controls.control_description:
As stated in paragraph 9, the outsourcing of any activity by an NBFC shall not
diminish its obligations including to its customers and RBI, and those of its Board
and senior management, who have the ultimate responsibility for the outsourced
activity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to diminish its obligations including to its customers and rbi, and those of its board and senior management, who have the ultimate responsibility for th

controls.control_objective: To ensure , therefore, be responsible for the actions of its service provider including direct sales agents (dsas) / direct marketing agents (dmas) and recovery
controls.control_description:
The NBFC shall, therefore, be responsible for the actions of its service
provider including Direct Sales Agents (DSAs) / Direct Marketing Agents (DMAs)
and recovery agents and the confidentiality of information pertaining to the
customers that is available with the service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , therefore, be responsible for the actions of its service provider including direct sales agents (dsas) / direct marketing agents (dmas) and recovery

controls.control_objective: To ensure retain ultimate control of the outsourced activity
controls.control_description:
The NBFC shall retain
ultimate control of the outsourced activity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to retain ultimate control of the outsourced activity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be owned or controlled by any director of the nbfc, or their relatives having the same meaning as assigned under companies act, 2013 and the rules fra
controls.control_description:
(vi) the service provider, if not a group company of the NBFC, shall not be owned
or controlled by any director of the NBFC, or their relatives having the same
meaning as assigned under Companies Act, 2013 and the Rules framed
thereunder, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be owned or controlled by any director of the nbfc, or their relatives having the same meaning as assigned under companies act, 2013 and the rules fra

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for making currency transactions reports (ctrs) and suspicious transactions reports (strs) to fiu or any other competent authority in r
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall be responsible for making Currency Transactions Reports (CTRs)
and Suspicious Transactions Reports (STRs) to FIU or any other competent
authority in respect of its customer related activities carried out by the service
providers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for making currency transactions reports (ctrs) and suspicious transactions reports (strs) to fiu or any other competent authority in r

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a comprehensive outsourcing policy, approved by its board, which shall incorporate, inter alia, the following:
controls.control_description:
An NBFC intending to outsource any of its financial services shall put in place a
comprehensive outsourcing policy, approved by its Board, which shall incorporate,
inter alia, the following:
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a comprehensive outsourcing policy, approved by its board, which shall incorporate, inter alia, the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, be responsible for:
controls.control_description: The Senior Management of an NBFC shall, inter alia, be responsible for:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, be responsible for:

controls.control_objective: To ensure evaluate and guard against the following key risks when entering into outsourcing arrangement:
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall evaluate and guard against the following key risks when entering
into outsourcing arrangement:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to evaluate and guard against the following key risks when entering into outsourcing arrangement:

controls.control_objective: To ensure arise due to technology failure, fraud, error, or inadequate financial capacity of the service provider to fulfil obligations or to provide remedies
controls.control_description:
(iv) Operational Risk - which may arise due to technology failure, fraud, error,
or inadequate financial capacity of the service provider to fulfil obligations or
to provide remedies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to arise due to technology failure, fraud, error, or inadequate financial capacity of the service provider to fulfil obligations or to provide remedies

controls.control_objective: To ensure arise when an nbfc becomes over reliant on one service provider, loses relevant internal skills preventing it from bringing the activity back in-house
controls.control_description:
(vi) Exit Strategy Risk - may arise when an NBFC becomes over reliant on one
service provider, loses relevant internal skills preventing it from bringing the
activity back in-house, or enters into contracts that make speedy exits
prohibitively expensive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to arise when an nbfc becomes over reliant on one service provider, loses relevant internal skills preventing it from bringing the activity back in-house

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the ability to enforce the contract with the service provider
controls.control_description:
(ix) Contractual Risk - where the NBFC may not have the ability to enforce the
contract with the service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the ability to enforce the contract with the service provider

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek to ensure the confidentiality, security, preservation, and protection of the customer information in the custody or possession of the service pro
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall seek to ensure the confidentiality, security, preservation, and
protection of the customer information in the custody or possession of the service
provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek to ensure the confidentiality, security, preservation, and protection of the customer information in the custody or possession of the service pro

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on a 'need to know' basis, i
controls.control_description:
Access to customer information by a service provider or its staff shall be on a
'need to know' basis, i.e., limited to those areas where the information is required
in order to perform the outsourced function.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on a 'need to know' basis, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure review and monitor the security practices and control processes of its service providers on a regular basis and require the service provider to disclo
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall review and monitor the security practices and control processes of
its service providers on a regular basis and require the service provider to disclose
security breaches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review and monitor the security practices and control processes of its service providers on a regular basis and require the service provider to disclo

controls.control_objective: To ensure take care to build strong safeguards so that there is no comingling or combining of information, documents, records, and assets
controls.control_description:
In instances, where a service provider acts as an outsourcing agent for multiple
entities, the NBFC shall take care to build strong safeguards so that there is no
comingling or combining of information, documents, records, and assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take care to build strong safeguards so that there is no comingling or combining of information, documents, records, and assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that a service provider is able to isolate and clearly identify the nbfc's customer information, documents, records and assets to protect the c
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall ensure that a service provider is able to isolate and clearly identify
the NBFC's customer information, documents, records and assets to protect the
confidentiality of the information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that a service provider is able to isolate and clearly identify the nbfc's customer information, documents, records and assets to protect the c

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately notify rbi in the event of breach of security and leakage of confidential customer related information
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall immediately notify RBI in the event of breach of security and
leakage of confidential customer related information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to immediately notify rbi in the event of breach of security and leakage of confidential customer related information

controls.control_objective: To ensure be liable to its customers for any damage
controls.control_description:
In these eventualities, the
NBFC shall be liable to its customers for any damage.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be liable to its customers for any damage

controls.control_objective: To ensure perform appropriate due diligence while considering or renewing an outsourcing arrangement, to assess the capability of the service provider to comply
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall perform appropriate due diligence while considering or renewing an
outsourcing arrangement, to assess the capability of the service provider to
comply with obligations in the outsourcing agreement on an ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to perform appropriate due diligence while considering or renewing an outsourcing arrangement, to assess the capability of the service provider to comply

controls.control_objective: To ensure involve an evaluation of all available information, as applicable, about the service provider, including but not limited to:
controls.control_description:
The due diligence mentioned above shall involve an evaluation of all available
information, as applicable, about the service provider, including but not limited to:

controls.control_objective: To ensure impact data security and service performance
controls.control_description:
(viii) external factors like political, economic, social, and legal environment of the
jurisdiction in which the service provider operates and other events that may
impact data security and service performance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to impact data security and service performance

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain independent reviews and market feedback on the service provider to supplement the findings of its own due diligence
controls.control_description:
Where possible, an NBFC shall obtain independent reviews and market feedback
on the service provider to supplement the findings of its own due diligence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain independent reviews and market feedback on the service provider to supplement the findings of its own due diligence

controls.control_objective: To ensure also evaluate whether the systems of its service provider are compatible with those of the nbfc, and the acceptability of their standards of performan
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall also evaluate whether the systems of its service provider are
compatible with those of the NBFC, and the acceptability of their standards of
performance including in the area of customer service.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also evaluate whether the systems of its service provider are compatible with those of the nbfc, and the acceptability of their standards of performan

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the terms and conditions governing the outsourcing arrangement are carefully defined in written agreements and vetted by the nbfc's legal
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall ensure that the terms and conditions governing the outsourcing
arrangement are carefully defined in written agreements and vetted by the NBFC's
legal counsel on their legal effect and enforceability.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the terms and conditions governing the outsourcing arrangement are carefully defined in written agreements and vetted by the nbfc's legal

controls.control_objective: To ensure appropriately reckon the associated risks and the strategies for mitigating or managing them
controls.control_description:
The agreement shall
appropriately reckon the associated risks and the strategies for mitigating or
managing them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appropriately reckon the associated risks and the strategies for mitigating or managing them

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that such an agreement is sufficiently flexible to allow it to retain an appropriate level of control over the outsourcing and the right to int
controls.control_description:
The NBFC shall ensure that such an agreement is sufficiently
flexible to allow it to retain an appropriate level of control over the outsourcing and
the right to intervene with appropriate measures to meet legal and regulatory
obligations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that such an agreement is sufficiently flexible to allow it to retain an appropriate level of control over the outsourcing and the right to int

controls.control_objective: To ensure also bring out the nature of legal relationship between the parties, i
controls.control_description:
The agreement shall also bring out the nature of legal relationship
between the parties, i.e., whether agent-principal or otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also bring out the nature of legal relationship between the parties, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure include:
controls.control_description: Some of the key provisions of the agreement shall include:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained even after the contract expires or gets terminated
controls.control_description:
(xi) provision that confidentiality of customers' information shall be maintained
even after the contract expires or gets terminated;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained even after the contract expires or gets terminated

controls.control_objective: To ensure have in place a management structure to monitor and control its outsourced activities and shall ensure that outsourcing agreements with its service pr
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall have in place a management structure to monitor and control its
outsourced activities and shall ensure that outsourcing agreements with its service
provider contain provisions to address the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have in place a management structure to monitor and control its outsourced activities and shall ensure that outsourcing agreements with its service pr

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain a central record of all material outsourcing of financial services for review by its board and senior management
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall maintain a central record of all material outsourcing of financial
services for review by its Board and Senior Management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain a central record of all material outsourcing of financial services for review by its board and senior management

controls.control_description:
The records shall be
<image>
updated promptly, and half yearly reviews shall be placed before the Board or Risk
Management Committee.

controls.control_objective: To ensure assess the adequacy of the risk management practices adopted in overseeing and managing the outsourcing arrangement, the nbfc's compliance with its ri
controls.control_description:
Regular audits, by either the internal auditors or external auditors of an NBFC shall
assess the adequacy of the risk management practices adopted in overseeing and
managing the outsourcing arrangement, the NBFC's compliance with its risk
management framework, and the requirements of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assess the adequacy of the risk management practices adopted in overseeing and managing the outsourcing arrangement, the nbfc's compliance with its ri

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at least on an annual basis, review the financial and operational condition of the service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its ou
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall, at least on an annual basis, review the financial and operational
condition of the service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its
outsourcing obligations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at least on an annual basis, review the financial and operational condition of the service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its ou

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on all available information about the service provider, shall highlight any deterioration or breach in performance standards, confidentialit
controls.control_description:
Such due diligence reviews, which shall be based on all
available information about the service provider, shall highlight any deterioration or
breach in performance standards, confidentiality, and security, and in operational
resilience or business continuity preparedness.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on all available information about the service provider, shall highlight any deterioration or breach in performance standards, confidentialit

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that reconciliation of transactions between itself and the service provider (or its subcontractors) is carried out in a timely manner
controls.control_description:
In such cases, the NBFC shall ensure that reconciliation of
transactions between itself and the service provider (or its subcontractors) is
carried out in a timely manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that reconciliation of transactions between itself and the service provider (or its subcontractors) is carried out in a timely manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure require its service provider to develop and establish a robust framework for documenting, maintaining, and testing business continuity and recovery pr
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall require its service provider to develop and establish a robust
framework for documenting, maintaining, and testing business continuity and
recovery procedures.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to require its service provider to develop and establish a robust framework for documenting, maintaining, and testing business continuity and recovery pr

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the service provider periodically tests the business continuity and recovery plan and may also consider occasional joint testing and recov
controls.control_description:
The NBFC shall ensure that the service provider periodically
tests the Business Continuity and Recovery Plan and may also consider
occasional joint testing and recovery exercises with its service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the service provider periodically tests the business continuity and recovery plan and may also consider occasional joint testing and recov

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider the availability of alternative service providers or the possibility of bringing the outsourced activity back in-house in an emergency, and t
controls.control_description:
In establishing a viable contingency plan, an NBFC shall consider the availability of
alternative service providers or the possibility of bringing the outsourced activity
back in-house in an emergency, and the costs, time, and resources that would be
involved.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider the availability of alternative service providers or the possibility of bringing the outsourced activity back in-house in an emergency, and t

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that its service providers are able to isolate the nbfc's information, documents, and records, and other assets so that in adverse <image> cond
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall ensure that its service providers are able to isolate the NBFC's
information, documents, and records, and other assets so that in adverse
<image>
conditions or termination of the agreement, all documents, records of transactions
and information given to the service provider, and assets of the NBFC, can be
removed from the possession of the service provider (in order to continue its
business operations);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that its service providers are able to isolate the nbfc's information, documents, and records, and other assets so that in adverse <image> cond

controls.control_objective: To ensure retain an appropriate level of control over its outsourcing arrangement along with the right to intervene with appropriate measures to continue its bu
controls.control_description:
In order to mitigate the risk of unexpected termination of the outsourcing
agreement or insolvency or liquidation of its service provider, an NBFC shall retain
an appropriate level of control over its outsourcing arrangement along with the
right to intervene with appropriate measures to continue its business operations
without incurring prohibitive expenses and disruption in the operations of the
NBFC and its services to the customers.

posting it on the website, and informing the customers so as to ensure that the
customers do not continue to deal with the service provider.

professional services, hardware and software applications and centralized back-
office functions;

controls.control_description:
Before entering into such arrangements with group entities, an NBFC shall have a
policy approved by the Board or a Committee of the Board and also Service Level
Agreements (SLAs) with its group entities, which shall also cover demarcation of
sharing resources, e.g., premises, and personnel.

controls.control_description:
In such arrangements, an NBFC shall inform the customers specifically about the
company which is actually offering the product / service, wherever there are
multiple group entities involved, or any cross selling observed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform the customers specifically about the company which is actually offering the product / service

controls.control_description:

would not be affected, if premises or other services (such as IT systems and
support staff) provided by the group entities become unavailable.

controls.control_description:

paragraph 18 of these Directions, an NBFC shall ensure that the service provider,

managerial personnel, or approver of the outsourcing arrangement of the NBFC,
or their relatives.

controls.control_description:

RBI within six hours of detection by the service provider.

controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall suitably document risk assessments with necessary approvals in
line with the roles and responsibilities of the Board of Directors, Senior
Management, and IT Function and subject the same to internal and external
quality assurance on a periodic basis as determined by the Board-approved policy.

confidentiality security, and operational resilience preparedness.

access to (a) data related to the outsourced services;

controls.control_objective: To ensure create an inventory of it services outsourced to service providers (including key entities involved in their supply chains)
controls.control_description:

controls.control_description:

BCP / DR requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be commensurate with the nature and scope of the outsourced service as per extant instructions issued by rbi from time to time on bcp / dr requirement

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain a clear exit strategy for ensuring business continuity during and after exit
controls.control_description:
The IT outsourcing policy shall contain a clear exit strategy for ensuring business
continuity during and after exit.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to contain a clear exit strategy for ensuring business continuity during and after exit

controls.control_objective: To ensure include plans for different scenarios of exit or termination of services with stipulation of minimum period to execute such plans, as necessary
controls.control_description:
The strategy shall include plans for different scenarios of exit or termination of
services with stipulation of minimum period to execute such plans, as necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include plans for different scenarios of exit or termination of services with stipulation of minimum period to execute such plans, as necessary

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, identify alternative arrangements, which may include performing the service by a different service provider, or by the nbfc itself
controls.control_description:
In documenting its exit strategy, an NBFC shall, inter alia, identify alternative
arrangements, which may include performing the service by a different service
provider, or by the NBFC itself.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, identify alternative arrangements, which may include performing the service by a different service provider, or by the nbfc itself

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that outsourcing agreements have necessary clauses on safe removal or destruction of data, hardware and all records (digital and physical), as
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall ensure that outsourcing agreements have necessary clauses on
safe removal or destruction of data, hardware and all records (digital and physical),
as applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to ensure that outsourcing agreements have necessary clauses on safe removal or destruction of data, hardware and all records (digital and physical), as

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the service provider is prohibited from erasing, purging, revoking, altering, or changing any <image> data during the transition period
controls.control_description:
Further, the outsourcing agreement shall ensure that the service
provider is prohibited from erasing, purging, revoking, altering, or changing any
<image>
data during the transition period, unless specifically advised by the regulator or the
concerned NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the service provider is prohibited from erasing, purging, revoking, altering, or changing any <image> data during the transition period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be legally obliged to cooperate fully with both the nbfc and its new service provider(s) to ensure there is a smooth transition
controls.control_description:
A service provider shall be legally obliged to cooperate fully with both the NBFC
and its new service provider(s) to ensure there is a smooth transition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be legally obliged to cooperate fully with both the nbfc and its new service provider(s) to ensure there is a smooth transition

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given due publicity by the nbfc so as to ensure that the customers stop dealing with the concerned service provider
controls.control_description:
In the event of termination of the outsourcing agreement for any reason in cases
where the service provider deals with the customers of the NBFC, the same shall
be given due publicity by the NBFC so as to ensure that the customers stop
dealing with the concerned service provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given due publicity by the nbfc so as to ensure that the customers stop dealing with the concerned service provider

controls.control_objective: To ensure such an arrangement is backed by the board-approved policy, and appropriate slas / agreements with its group entities are in place
controls.control_description:
An NBFC may outsource any IT service within its business group / conglomerate,
provided that such an arrangement is backed by the Board-approved policy, and
appropriate SLAs / agreements with its group entities are in place.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to such an arrangement is backed by the board-approved policy, and appropriate slas / agreements with its group entities are in place

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on objective reasons that are similar to selection of a third-party, and the nbfc shall appropriately deal with any conflicts of interest tha
controls.control_description:
The selection of a group entity shall be based on objective reasons that are similar
to selection of a third-party, and the NBFC shall appropriately deal with any
conflicts of interest that such an outsourcing arrangement may entail.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on objective reasons that are similar to selection of a third-party, and the nbfc shall appropriately deal with any conflicts of interest tha

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain an arm's length relationship in dealings with its group entities
controls.control_description:
An NBFC, at all times, shall maintain an arm's length relationship in dealings with
its group entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain an arm's length relationship in dealings with its group entities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be identical to those specified for a non-related party
controls.control_description:
Risk management practices being adopted by the NBFC while
outsourcing to a group entity shall be identical to those specified for a non-related
party.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be identical to those specified for a non-related party

controls.control_objective: To ensure only be entered into with parties operating in jurisdictions that uphold confidentiality clauses and agreements
controls.control_description:
In principle, outsourcing arrangements shall only be entered into with parties
operating in jurisdictions that uphold confidentiality clauses and agreements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only be entered into with parties operating in jurisdictions that uphold confidentiality clauses and agreements

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt the following requirements in the case of outsourcing of soc operations in addition to the controls prescribed in this chapter: definition, cust
controls.control_description:
Considering the risks associated with outsourcing of Security Operations Centre
(SOC) operations by an NBFC, such as data being stored and processed at an
external location and managed by the service provider (or its subcontractors) to
which the NBFC has lesser visibility, the NBFC, to mitigate the risks, shall adopt
the following requirements in the case of outsourcing of SOC operations in
addition to the controls prescribed in this Chapter:
definition, customisation and related data / logs, meta-data and analytics
(specific to the NBFC);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt the following requirements in the case of outsourcing of soc operations in addition to the controls prescribed in this chapter: definition, cust

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in addition to other applicable provisions in these directions:
controls.control_description:
Considering the varied services, benefits, and risk profiles associated with the
cloud deployment and service models, an NBFC that uses cloud services for
storage, computing and movement of data in cloud environments shall, in addition
to other applicable provisions in these Directions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in addition to other applicable provisions in these directions:

controls.control_objective: To ensure include, but not be limited to, an analysis of various heads of cloud-related expenditure, such as application refactoring, integration, consulting, m
controls.control_description:
Such
assessment shall include, but not be limited to, an analysis of various heads
of cloud-related expenditure, such as application refactoring, integration,
consulting, migration, and projected recurring expenditure depending on the
<image>
nature of workloads.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include, but not be limited to, an analysis of various heads of cloud-related expenditure, such as application refactoring, integration, consulting, m

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined based on a duly conducted business technology risk assessment
controls.control_description:
The extent of cloud adoption may vary, ranging from
migration of non-business critical workloads to the cloud, to deployment of
critical business applications such as SaaS, or other combinations in
between, and shall be determined based on a duly conducted business
technology risk assessment;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined based on a duly conducted business technology risk assessment

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure that specified procedures are consistent with business needs and legal and regulatory requirements
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ensure that specified procedures are consistent with business needs and legal and regulatory requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to, inter alia, nist sp 800-210 general access control guidance for cloud systems https://nvlpubs
controls.control_description:
For cloud security best practices, an NBFC may refer to, inter alia, NIST SP
800-210 General Access Control Guidance for Cloud Systems
https://nvlpubs.nist.gov/nistpubs/SpecialPublications/NIST.SP.800-210.pdf.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to refer to, inter alia, nist sp 800-210 general access control guidance for cloud systems https://nvlpubs

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia
controls.control_description:
Such a policy shall, inter
alia,
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into a contract only with csps that are subject to jurisdictions that uphold enforceability of agreements and the rights available thereunder to
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall enter into a contract only with CSPs
that are subject to jurisdictions that uphold enforceability of agreements and
the rights available thereunder to the NBFC, including those relating to
aspects such as data storage, data protection, and confidentiality;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into a contract only with csps that are subject to jurisdictions that uphold enforceability of agreements and the rights available thereunder to

controls.control_description: The technology architecture shall:

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be a part of the service level stipulations in sla
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be a part of the service level stipulations in sla

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those Directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or Directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
